garages.name: L.A. LIVE — West Garage
garages.notes: Serves Crypto.com Arena, Microsoft Theater, LA Live. No limos, buses, sprinter vans, or oversized.

garages.name: L.A. LIVE — East Garage
garages.notes: Companion to West Garage. Same 8'2" clearance.

garages.name: ROW DTLA — Levels 1-8
garages.notes: Main levels. Levels 9-10 only 7'0" — know your level.

garages.name: Getty Center Parking Structure

garages.notes: Surface lots. Accommodates oversized/RVs on game days with separate lot.

garages.name: LAX Economy Parking — Level 1
garages.notes: Level 1 has 14' clearance — fits RVs + oversized. Shuttle to terminals.

garages.name: LAX Economy — Levels 2-4
garages.notes: Upper levels 8'1" only — stay on Level 1 for tall vehicles.

garages.name: SoFi Stadium — Pink Zone (NFL Oversized)
garages.notes: Designated oversized vehicle parking for Rams/Chargers games. Requires 'Pink Zone - Oversized' pass. RVs, buses, motorcoaches.

garages.name: SoFi Stadium — Red Zone (Non-NFL Oversized)
garages.notes: For concerts/non-NFL events. 'Red Zone - Oversized Vehicle Only' pass required. Enter via Century Blvd → Yukon Ave.

garages.name: SoFi Stadium — General Event Lots
garages.notes: Surface lots for standard vehicles on event days.

garages.name: Exposition Park — Blue Structure Level A
garages.notes: Level A only. Serves USC, Coliseum, California Science Center, Natural History Museum.

garages.name: Exposition Park — Blue Structure Levels B-D
garages.notes: Upper levels tighter — 7'0". Large vehicles must use Level A.

garages.name: LA Coliseum — Event Lots
garages.notes: USC football + concerts. Surface lots. Oversized OK.

tunnels.name: 2nd Street Tunnel
tunnels.notes: 1,502' long. Famous filming location. Connects Hill St → Figueroa.

tunnels.name: 3rd Street Tunnel
tunnels.notes: Parallel to 2nd Street Tunnel. Similar clearance.

tunnels.name: Figueroa Street Tunnels (Arroyo Seco)
tunnels.addr: N Figueroa St under Elysian Park
tunnels.notes: Four tunnels on Pasadena (Arroyo Seco) Pkwy. Historic 1930s construction. Tall — not a low-clearance concern.

bridges.name: Arroyo Seco Pkwy — Low Overpasses
bridges.notes: Historic narrow parkway. Some overpasses pre-date standard clearances. Avoid with box trucks.

bridges.name: Union Station — Garfield Ave Underpass
bridges.notes: Rail underpass near Alameda. Trucks regularly strike.
